title: CME Group sues CFTC over crypto perpetual futures
summary: The lawsuit targets the federal regulator and Chair Michael Selig, alleging that the Commodity Futures Trading Commissioin is treating cryptocurrency “futures” as “swaps,” posing risks to derivatives markets.

title: Bitcoin miners need billions to fund AI ambitions, led by IREN’s $21B gap
summary: IREN leads public Bitcoin miners with a projected $21.1 billion AI infrastructure funding gap, underscoring the capital-intensive nature of converting mining sites into data centers.

title: Bitcoin Falls Back Toward $60,000 on Strategy Shares, Rate Fears
summary: Bitcoin extended its slide back toward the $60,000 level. The decline is driven by mounting concerns over the unraveling of Strategy Inc.’s funding mechanism, alongside rate-hike fears that are dampening demand for riskier assets.

title: Heart Health Biotech Kardigan Up 27% After $400 Million IPO
summary: Kardigan Inc. shares surged 27% in its trading debut, after the heart-health focused biotech raised $400 million in an initial public offering.

title: Bitcoin Price Falls to $62,000 as Hawkish Fed Shift Raises Risk of Deeper Pullback
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Traders Grow Even More Bearish as Prices Fall After Fed Decision
summary: Prediction market traders don't see Bitcoin or Ethereum making their next big moves to higher price targets.

title: Everyday Savers Bet Big on Bitcoin Giant Strategy's STRC—Now It's Falling
summary: Everyday investors that own Strategy’s STRC have been drawn to double-digit yields, but the preferred stock’s volatility has shaken some.

title: CME Group sues CFTC over perpetual futures in US, accusing the agency of ‘suddenly’ changing course
summary: The CME Group is officially taking the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to court over allowing perpetual futures to trade in the U.S.

title: Bitcoin miners Bitdeer, CleanSpark and more report mixed May output as AI buildouts impact hashrate growth, treasury models
summary: Bitdeer, BitFuFu, Canaan and CleanSpark posted May bitcoin production updates, with combined output of 1,859 BTC and diverging strategies.

title: US-Iran accord opens way for Hormuz charges, industry warns
summary: Shipping executives fear language will enable Tehran to introduce fees after 60 days or a fund similar to Strait of Malacca

title: Hegseth unveils six-month review of US military presence in Europe
summary: Defence secretary announced decision as he scolded Nato allies for failing to support Washington in Iran war
